svg.title: Complete frontend folder and file structure
svg.desc: Every file path needed for the Event Ticketing System React frontend
svg.text: api.js ← axios instance + interceptors + loader logic
auth.service.js ← register, login, logout, me, verifyEmail, resendOtp
events.service.js ← getEvents, getEvent, createEvent, updateEvent, deleteEvent
admin.service.js ← getStats, getUsers, updateRole, updateStatus, getAdminEvents
authStore.js ← user, token, role, isVerified — login/logout actions
loaderStore.js ← topBarActive, centerActive — used by api.js interceptors
uiStore.js ← toasts, modals, sidebar open/close state
useEvents.js ← fetches events with filters, pagination
useAdmin.js ← stats, users, events for admin pages
roleGuard.js ← checks role against allowed list
TopBarLoader.jsx ← thin progress bar at top of viewport (fast APIs)
CenterLoader.jsx ← 3-bar spinner in center of page (slow APIs)
Button.jsx Input.jsx Modal.jsx Badge.jsx Pagination.jsx Toast.jsx

g.text: src/pages/ (one folder per role — mirrors your backend roles)
